data.title: 国际服Discord频道1,000,000成员纪念礼物
data.summary: [100,000 Discord Member Celebration] Sensei, Blue Archive's official Discord has reached 100,000 mem
data.body:
[100,000 Discord Member Celebration]

Sensei, Blue Archive's official Discord has reached 100,000 members!
Please check your in-game mailbox to receive a special thank-you gift!

#BlueArchive![bxfbiFGBkMIGiBAphsO7NplNgwesfcO2.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/bxfbiFGBkMIGiBAphsO7NplNgwesfcO2.jpg)
